expect: Category coverage ~90-92% (sawtooth decay from 94.5% at N=779). Max bucket ~40+. Dark matter ~150-200. Pointer coverage under 30%.
actual: Category coverage 73.6% (743/1009) — deep sawtooth trough, steepest decay yet. Dark matter 266 (26.4%), super-linear growth confirmed. Max bucket 36 (3 buckets at 35+, approaching 40 split). Pointer coverage 10.9% (110/1009, declining from 13.4%). Combined pointer coverage 51.8% (523/1009 with domain indexes). True dark matter 486 lessons (48.2%) unreachable by any index.
diff: Coverage 73.6% vs expected 90-92% — MISSED, much worse. Decay rate 10x (0.091pp/L vs 0.009pp/L). Max bucket 36 vs 40+ — MISSED (not yet). Dark matter 266 vs 150-200 — EXCEEDED (worse). Pointer 10.9% vs <30% — MET technically but declining. 3/4 predictions optimistic.
verdict: PREDICTIONS OPTIMISTIC. Hippocampal index degradation accelerated past N=800. Sawtooth cycle 3 deepest trough: 73.6%. Remediation cycle needed.
key_finding: Decay rate accelerated 10x. Theme counts frozen at S430 levels while 266 lessons accumulated unthemed. INDEX not self-maintaining. At current rate, S189-level (71.9%) within ~20 lessons.
